title: Ridsdalea pseudoternifolia

The plant has been found to possess potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
